message.content:
Review the "Event Horizon: Proximity-Based Docking in Rocket Mode" feature across these 5 files for bugs, logic errors, and race conditions. This is review pass 11 — previous passes found and fixed 21 bugs. Focus on finding NEW bugs not yet fixed. Be rigorous but avoid false positives — only report bugs with genuine functional impact.

Files to review:
1. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\hooks\useRocketMode.js`
2. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\layers\RocketLayer.jsx`
3. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\components\RocketHUD.jsx`
4. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.jsx`
5. `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Universe\Universe.module.css`

Previously fixed bugs (DO NOT re-report):
1. Key listener memory leak — fixed with dedicated refs
2. Double rAF loop — fixed with cleanup at top of enter()/restoreFromSnapshot()
3. Callback overwrite mid-animation — fixed with state guard
4. Zero stageSize on restore — fixed with width/height guard
5. Infinite rAF after done — fixed with isActiveRef=false + return
6. Infinite redirect loop — fixed with camera backup + 2s cooldown
7. Star position inconsistency — fixed with galaxyCenterRef
8. Stale callback in exit() — fixed with null clear
9. Stale dockState in detection — fixed by reading live ref
10. sessionStorage throws — fixed with try/catch
11. Asymmetric stageSize guard — fixed in handleExploreGalaxy
12. Auto-dock callback nulled after first docking — fixed with re-call after restore
13. Callback nulled after manual ENTER docking — fixed with autoDockCbRef
14. Auto-docking can't fire in magnet state — fixed with magnet→approaching transition
15. Warp-in animation/timeout mismatch — fixed CSS to 0.8s
16. Flash overlay starts during Phase 2 — fixed threshold to 0.9
17. Inconsistent worldZ seeding — fixed with pre-consumed RNG calls
18. Unstable rocketMode object reference — fixed with useMemo
19. Missing timeout cleanup in restore effect — fixed with cleanup return
20. Missing timeout cleanup in handleExploreGalaxy — fixed with warpTimerRef
21. Surprise auto-dock after magnet target switch — fixed with 500ms cooldown

Look for bugs with confidence >= 80%. If no bugs found at ≥80% confidence, say "NO BUGS FOUND".

content.text: I'll read all five files in parallel to begin the review.
